title: atractylis lyrata f. ternata
intro: Atractylis lyrata f. ternata, also known as White Horehound or Chinese Horehound, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Atractylis lyrata f. ternata is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
